name: Expense & Invoice Email Scanner
description: Scans Gmail for PDF attachments matching invoice/expense queries, extracts structured data via document extractor, stores per-vendor in Google Drive, conditionally appends to Google Sheets if amount > 50, sends HTML digest email. Exercises WP-32 (StructuralRepairEngine flatten-field validation for per-item-nested attachments extraction) and WP-33 (with_fields template-string expression tolerance). Phase E was blocked pre-WP-32 (validator rewrote 'attachments' → 'emails'; flatten returned []) and pre-WP-33 (with_fields received resolved URL string; evaluateExpression threw INVALID_EXPRESSION). Post-fix, the cascade flows end-to-end and a digest email is delivered. **Known weakness (WP-34 deferred):** for image-based PDFs without a text layer, document-extractor returns 'Unknown <Field>' defaults — the cascade succeeds but the email content is fabricated. Real extraction succeeds only on text-layer PDFs or with AWS Textract configured.

expected.phase_e_caveat: WP-34: image-PDF extraction returns Unknown defaults; email delivered but content fabricated. Cascade integrity verified (WP-32 + WP-33). Real extraction requires text-layer PDF or Textract.
